# programs.bashmount

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.bashmount`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.bashmount.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bashmount. |
| `programs.bashmount.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/bashmount/config`. Look at <https://github.com/jamielinux/bashmount/blob/master/bashmount.conf> for explanation about possible values. |
| `programs.bashmount.package` | `null or package` | The bashmount package to use. |
